# Transcrição: Common_Misconception__You're_Stuck_With_Your_Voice

- **Fonte:** Common_Misconception__You're_Stuck_With_Your_Voice
- **Duração:** 01:21
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 01:21]

The most common question I get on social media all the time is people say, Vin, is it possible for me to change how I sound? Is it possible? So I asked my students a question in return. I said, hey, is it possible for you to change your behavior? I mean, think about it. If you communicate often and you put your hands in your pocket and you always put your hand in your pocket, is it possible for you to change that behavior? Well, yeah, Vin. I mean, you just take your hands out. I'm like, OK, cool. Did you know that the way you speak, the way you talk, the way you sound, it's created by a series of behaviors? It is. It's a series of behaviors that you do with your mouth. It's a series of behaviors that you do with your tongue. It's how you control the breath that's coming out. I watched The Dark Knight again the other day. No one cared who I was till I put on the mask. And if I really wanted to change the way I sounded, I could sound like Bane. I could be like, I'm Bane. I was born in the darkness. You merely rented the shadows. I can sound like that for the rest of my life. I could make the decision to sound like that for the rest of my life. I think my wife would probably leave me. My son would never want to talk to me again. The thing is, I've just consciously made the decision to sound the way I currently sound. Whereas for many of you sitting here, what you don't realize is you've already committed to unconscious behaviors that you've been exhibiting your entire life to create the sound that you're currently exhibiting. And because they become habits, they become invisible to you. And because they become invisible to you, you sit there in your life and you start to think, this is my natural voice.
